title: Cache Identity, TTL, Clock Injection, Readonly Copies, and Capacity · Inference Brief: Pokedex Ts Clock Freshness
summary: The cache keys raw input, reads Date.now internally, shares mutable objects, conflates stale with absent, stores aborted promises, and has no entry or byte ceiling. Predict the user decision, runtime value, strict type claim, promise state, API boundary, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex ts clock freshness increment in observable bounded TypeScript resource cache. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theo…
objectives: Inject a clock and define fresh, stale, expired, and boundary instants without timer sleeps in unit tests.
Create a canonical typed key from endpoint, resolved identity, page parameters, and representation rather than user spelling.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
